title: COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting skills education using Collaborative Problem Solving (CPS) model. CPS is a strategy used to build family relationships, parental efficacy, and the coping skills of children. Parent groups are divided into four group training levels with kids groups running parallel to the parent groups. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Parents with children of all ages Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
